text: Being here, I feel a sense of isolation and subdued tension. The dimness and stark artificial light cast long shadows, amplifying the silence and sterility of this enclosed space. The R+D wall hints at innovation and ambition, yet the emptiness contrasts with that spirit, invoking feelings of anticipation mixed with uncertainty. I am acutely aware of my own solitude, left to ponder the boundaries between progress, emptiness, and my place within these forgotten corners.
